channel.title: Illustrative City Desk — RSS (demo fixture)
channel.description: Synthetic feed for the flood-catalog collection demo.

item.title: MTA suspends subway service as Ida remnants flood NYC stations
item.description: The MTA suspended service across most subway lines overnight as record rainfall from the remnants of Hurricane Ida flooded stations and tunnels in dozens of locations.
item.dc:creator: City Desk

item.title: Crews pump tens of millions of gallons from flooded subway after Ida
item.description: In the days after the storm, crews removed roughly 75 million gallons of water from the subway system; the MTA estimated infrastructure damage at about $128 million.
item.dc:creator: City Desk
